name: North Shore Ohana School of Surfing
tagline: Red Cross Ocean Safety certified instructors at Chun's Reef — a family-run North Shore school with a stand-and-ride guarantee.
price: $$ — Group lesson ~$89, private ~$179 (2 hrs, all equipment included)
parking: Meet at Chun's Reef; roadside parking along Kamehameha Highway
hours: Daily 9 AM–4 PM; book online, free cancellation day-before
bestTime: Summer for the most beginner-friendly conditions; 9 AM session for calmest water
talkStory: North Shore Ohana School of Surfing teaches at Chun's Reef — a mellow longboard break two miles north of Haleiwa town right in the heart of the Seven Mile Miracle. All instructors are Red Cross Ocean Safety certified, which is a step above what most schools require. They guarantee you'll stand and ride in your first lesson or come back free. The 'ohana' (family) name isn't just branding — the school is family-run and treats students like extended family, with instructors offering tips and wave-reading lessons throughout the session rather than just pushing you into whitewater. They also offer tandem lessons for parent-child pairs. Consistently praised on TripAdvisor for patient, knowledgeable instruction.
